name: @irisrun/store-do
description: Edge host adapter that proves portability — the Cloudflare Durable Objects StateStore + Scheduler enforcing the SAME CAS/fencing/hwm/snapshot invariants as the sqlite/fs stores, so the same image resumes the same session on the edge byte-identically. Cold-per-turn isolate + DO-alarm durable timer over a narrow DoStorage abstraction. Install-free: tested against FakeDoStorage; the real isolate is a manual smoke. No @cloudflare/* import.
